payload.reason: Release controller spans design, implementation, Docker deployment, live API-host rollout, verification, docs, and branch cleanup; split into independently checkable work packages.

payload.title: Add release-controller tests and CI guards
Deploy release-controller to API host and verify
Migrate CI/CD docs and clean stale branches

payload.reason: Architecture design is bounded, read-mostly, and verifiable by a document with required sections mapped to current deploy/runtime substrate.
Core service implementation has independent config/state/planning/API/test slices that need separate success criteria before meaningful execution.

payload.title: Release-controller branch planner and command runner
Build release-controller config and model foundation

payload.reason: Config and model foundation is narrow, low-risk, import-testable, and has immediate validation checks.
Persistent state store is a bounded file-backed module with immediate tmp_path verification and no external dependencies.

payload.title: Implement release-controller planner and command runner

payload.reason: Planner and runner are a cohesive bounded core module with injectable execution and immediate unit-test verification.
HTTP control plane can be implemented as one bounded app-factory slice over the already-tested state and planner modules, with in-process API tests.
Core test verification is narrow, already locally runnable, and has explicit acceptance criteria.
Branch polling can be implemented as a bounded synchronous module with injectable providers and no network-dependent tests.
Containerization touches independent Dockerfile, Compose runtime, and deploy-script integration surfaces that need separate verification.
Docker image packaging is a narrow bounded change with direct build/test verification.
Compose runtime integration is a bounded declarative change with direct render validation.
Deploy command extension is one bounded script change with shell syntax and help-output verification.

payload.title: Add release-controller tests and CI guards

payload.reason: CI guard addition is a focused scripts/ci change with local pytest verification and no external services.

payload.title: Deploy release-controller to API host and verify

payload.reason: Deployment is a bounded additive rollout with explicit health checks, no public ingress change, and no existing service restart requirement.

payload.title: Migrate release-controller CI/CD docs and clean stale branches

payload.reason: Documentation migration and branch cleanup have different risk profiles and need separate evidence before closure.

payload.title: Inspect and clean stale local branches

payload.reason: Documentation update is a bounded patch with marker-search verification.

payload.title: Inspect and clean stale local branches

payload.reason: Branch cleanup is a bounded local git inspection/deletion task with immediate branch/status verification.
Poll-once wiring is a bounded endpoint/test/deploy update over the existing poller module.
